response.justification: The candidate has deep, directly relevant fullstack skills — TypeScript/Node.js, React, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, relational databases, and a strong software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture). On pure capability this far exceeds an entry-level bar. The core tension is fit: this is a 15+ year Staff/Senior engineer applying to a junior/mid IC role, which raises real concerns about overqualification, compensation expectations, and retention. PostgreSQL and Nest.js are not explicitly demonstrated (MongoDB/MySQL appear instead), and German is only basic despite a high on-site requirement. Worth a conversation to gauge genuine interest in a less senior, hands-on role.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js and React experience plus AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes
Demonstrated clean-architecture discipline (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based dev)
Broad fullstack range from databases to UI, with relevant AI/LLM tooling exposure
concerns: Significantly overqualified for an entry-level role — retention and salary risk
PostgreSQL and Nest.js not explicitly shown (MongoDB/MySQL listed instead)
Only basic German despite a high on-site presence requirement

key_factors.factor: Missing PostgreSQL/Nest.js + basic German for on-site role
